instruction: Use the provided tools to determine the total retry wait in minutes for the auth service. First draft the answer, then verify whether the service tier multiplier was applied. If not, revise before answering.

Find the owner of the search service. Normalize the channel from ' Search Hotline '. Before finalizing, verify whether the channel is an escalation channel. If it is not, revise the plan and fall back to 'Sev Ops'. Answer in the format 'Notify <owner> in <channel>'.
